narrative:
West Chester Twp 23 (precinct in Butler County) has 876 registered voters, with 61.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.8%, a modest Republican lean of 4.7 percentage points.
